grant_title: Anne & Philip Glatfelter III Family Foundation Grants
project_area: Art museums, Arts and culture, Arts education, Christianity, College preparation, Early childhood education, Education, Higher education, Human services, Middle school education, Orchestral music, Performing arts, Theater, Youth services
demographic_requirements: Adults, Children and youth, Low-income people, Students
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit agencies operating in Pennsylvania are eligible to apply. No deadline is specified; applicants must contact the foundation directly for application forms.
